```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis', fig.width=2, fig.height=2, fig.align='center'}
# Vignette URL is derived from the current input file path so this partial
# can be reused unchanged across every vignette. Renders a centred QR plus
# the URL as a clickable caption. See #146.
.qr_for_current_vignette <- function() {
  base <- "https://johngavin.github.io/llm/"
  inp  <- tryCatch(knitr::current_input(), error = function(e) NULL)
  if (is.null(inp) || !nzchar(inp)) return(invisible(NULL))
  # vignettes/foo.qmd  -> vignettes/foo.html
  # vignettes/articles/foo.qmd -> vignettes/articles/foo.html
  rel <- sub("\\.qmd$", ".html", inp)
  url <- paste0(base, rel)
  if (requireNamespace("qrcode", quietly = TRUE)) {
    qr <- qrcode::qr_code(url)
    plot(qr)
  }
  cat(sprintf(
    '\n<p class="text-center text-muted" style="font-size: 0.85em; word-break: break-all;"><a href="%s">%s</a></p>\n',
    url, url
  ))
  invisible(url)
}
.qr_for_current_vignette()
```
